scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix codevault/frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix codevault/backend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm install --prefix codevault/frontend --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix codevault/frontend && npm install --prefix codevault/backend --legacy-peer-deps
